BASIC_PASS.description: Set a password for HTTP Basic auth on the upload endpoint.

BASIC_USER.description: Optional username for HTTP Basic auth. Default is `user`.

API_PATH_PREFIX.description: Path served by the upload API, for example `upload` or `api/upload`. Use an empty value to serve from `/`.

IMAGES.description: R2 bucket used to store uploaded images. Cloudflare can provision this during template deployment.

PUBLIC_BASE_URL.description: Public base URL used in the returned image URL, for example `https://img.example.com` or your R2 public domain.

PUBLIC_PATH_PREFIX.description: Object key prefix included in returned URLs. Default is `images`.
